text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm about to eat in the<n>cafeteria...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Special Mont Blanc! Only Ten<n>Available a Day!
That sounds enticing,<n>but they look so calorie
dense...
choice_data_list: That's some look on your face. Are you okay?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Eeek! G-goodness, it's just you. I<n>would
appreciate it if you didn't scare<n>me so!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: More importantly, I wish to seek youradvice! I—ahem. I mean, a friendof mine has a bit of an issue...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Despite understanding the importance<n>of
maintaining her weight in order to<n>prepare for her
race properly, well...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let's just say she has trouble<n>adhering to her
strict diet at the best of<n>times. Have you any
advice for her<n>regarding this issue?
choice_data_list:
She should do her best to stick to her diet until
the race is over.

She should be fine if she runs more to burn off
what she eats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, of course! It's certainly<n>important to stick
to one's word, and<n>one must practice
self-control.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Many thanks for your advice! Iappreciate—I mean, I'm sure myfriend will appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes, indeed! I was thinking that as<n>well!
Repressing your urges for too<n>long is detrimental
to your health, after<n>all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I'll have just a smidgen of this<n>as a treat!
I shall savor this later. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Many thanks for your advice! Iappreciate—I mean, I'm sure myfriend will appreciate it!
